```python
import numpy as np

def place_odcs(instance, n_active):
    # Crie uma matriz de distância entre clientes
    client_distances = np.zeros((instance.n_clients, instance.n_clients))
    for i in range(instance.n_clients):
        for j in range(i+1, instance.n_clients):
            dist = np.linalg.norm(instance.client_coords[i] - instance.client_coords[j])
            client_distances[i, j] = dist
            client_distances[j, i] = dist

    # Faça um clustering hierárquico (aglomerativo) dos clientes
    cluster_assignments = np.arange(instance.n_clients)
    cluster_distances = client_distances.copy()
    num_clusters = instance.n_clients

    while num_clusters > n_active:
        # Encontre o par de clusters mais próximo
        min_dist = np.inf
        min_idx = (-1, -1)
        for i in range(num_clusters):
            for j in range(i+1, num_clusters):
                dist = np.min(cluster_distances[i, j])
                if dist < min_dist:
                    min_dist = dist
                    min_idx = (i, j)

        # Mergue os dois clusters mais próximos
        cluster_assignments[cluster_assignments == min_idx[1]] = min_idx[0]
        cluster_distances = np.delete(cluster_distances, min_idx[1], axis=0)
        cluster_distances = np.delete(cluster_distances, min_idx[1], axis=1)
        cluster_distances[min_idx[0], :] = np.minimum(cluster_distances[min_idx[0], :], cluster_distances[min_idx[1], :])
        cluster_distances[:, min_idx[0]] = np.minimum(cluster_distances[:, min_idx[0]], cluster_distances[:, min_idx[1]])
        num_clusters -= 1

    # Encontre os medoides (sites reais) para cada cluster
    site_assignments = np.zeros(n_active, dtype=int)
    for i in range(n_active):
        cluster_members = np.where(cluster_assignments == i)[0]
        site_dists = instance.distances[cluster_members, :]
        site_dists = np.min(site_dists, axis=0)
        site_assignments[i] = np.argmin(site_dists)

    # Se necessário, complete com os demais sites
    if len(np.unique(site_assignments)) < n_active:
        remaining_sites = np.setdiff1d(np.arange(instance.n_sites), site_assignments)
        remaining_sites = remaining_sites[np.argsort(np.min(instance.distances, axis=0)[remaining_sites])]
        site_assignments = np.concatenate((site_assignments, remaining_sites[:n_active - len(np.unique(site_assignments))]))

    # Se necessário, corte para os n_active primeiros
    if len(np.unique(site_assignments)) > n_active:
        site_assignments = site_assignments[:n_active]

    return site_assignments
```
